summary: The notebook currently holds one course note on gradient descent and one paper-reading note on the Transformer, spanning machine-learning foundations and deep-learning architecture.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: A single foundational note covers gradient descent, the update rule, a quadratic worked example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: The ml-foundations course has only one note; core topics like loss functions, backpropagation, regularization, and generalization are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A structured reading note on 'Attention Is All You Need' covers self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on subsequent architectures, sub-quadratic attention variants, or the training and scaling recipes referenced as improvements.
